zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan Darrell於1464年出生在英國越可爾瑟賽時，她的父親Sir George Darrell45歲，母親Margaret Plumpton26歲。她於1484年與Sir Guy D’Awnay在英國越可爾史乃斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1525年4月28日在英國越可爾考維其可享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾瑟賽。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan Darrell于1464年出生在英国越可爾瑟賽时，她的父亲Sir George Darrell45岁，母亲Margaret Plumpton26岁。她于1484年与Sir Guy D’Awnay在英国越可爾史乃斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1525年4月28日在英国越可爾考維其可享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾瑟賽。

nameMeanings.name: Darrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Airelle in Calvados, France, or Airel in La Manche, Normandy. Compare Dorrell .

variants.name: Dural
meanings: Turkish: ornamental name or nickname from dural ‘always the same’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan Darrell was born in 1464, in Sessay, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir George Darrell, was 45 and her mother, Margaret Plumpton, was 26. She married Sir Guy D’Awnay in 1484, in Snaith, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 28 April 1525, in Cowick, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Sessay, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan Darrell est née en 1464, à Sessay, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir George Darrell, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margaret Plumpton, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Guy D’Awnay en 1484, à Snaith, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 avril 1525, à Cowick, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Sessay, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Darrell(이)가 1464년 영국 요르크실르 세지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Darrell(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Plumpton(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1484년 영국 요르크실르 스나이스에서 Sir Guy D’Awnay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1525년 4월 28일 영국 요르크실르 코윅에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 세지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Darrell nasceu em 1464, em Sessay, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir George Darrell, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Plumpton, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Guy D’Awnay em 1484, em Snaith, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de abril de 1525, em Cowick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Sessay, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan Darrell родилась в 1464 г. в местности сессеи, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir George Darrell было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Plumpton, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Guy D’Awnay в 1484 г. в местности снеит, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 апреля 1525 г. в местности коуикк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности сессеи, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
